3	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 9	Subject Lines and Ad Creatives - Writing Creatives
Subject Lines
and Ad Creatives
WRITING CREATIVES
(00:00)
Okay. So now we’ve got just some subject lines that we’ve created. What’s
the fastest way to do an email creative? Really, all you need to do for an email
creative is about curiosity and it’s about getting them to click, that’s all we
want. We want them to read the email, open the email and we want them to
click the link in the email. Now that we have some subject lines, let’s say,
again, if it were me, if I was doing this for an offer, I’d probably do a bunch
more and variants of this but let’s just do quick example.
(00:43)
So let’s go ahead, let’s pick one. I like this one so let’s do this and then now we
want to do an email creative really fast and we have the sales copy already,
which was this one here. Literally, the first thing I would do...honestly you
want to see the craziest thing? I mean, you could make the link up high if you
wanted to. The controversial Harvard Business trick that can net you $3K per
month fast. Boom, done so that’s the fastest you’ve ever seen somebody ever
write a 10 or 23-word email creative? Again, your subject line, your body copy.
Pretty cool, right and that’s the big secret. I mean or you can totally share
the lead and just put it here. Why are you over complicating it, making things
harder, if you are.
(02:42)
Now let’s go and insert a page break and let’s do another subject line. I’m sure
they have a better way to put this. We’re doing that one. Garth Conway. That’s
why when I came across an unfair, but legal trick for making $3K for a month from
home, something that was first developed by a controversial Harvard Business
School professor, I figured I’d give it a try. I had nothing to lose really and while
almost seemed too easy because I was basically just acting as a middleman
sitting between buyers and sellers who wanted to be connected to one another.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

4	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 9	Subject Lines and Ad Creatives - Writing Creatives
(05:27)
In my very first month,” - it’s his story how much he made in his first month -
“I’d made more than $12,000. To say that this changed my life would be the
understatement of the century; it’s been a true blessing. Now I want to show
you exactly how this middleman method works. That way” - maybe Harvard
won’t like me using their name, but for this case - “you can try it for yourself,
too. Click here to see controversial method that can create $3K a month in
income for you and your family fast.”
(06:56)
Signature, maybe “P.S. There’s no upfront cost to it - because you’re acting
the middleman, you don’t have to spend money on equipment or supplies or
anything like that. In fact, 14,000 - how many was it? I have 14,954 Americans
just like you have already started profiting from this secret and many of
them never even finished high school or know the first thing about starting a
business. Curious? Click here to see how it works now.”
(08:04)
So then really just boop and boop. Going back to that first one by the way.
Did I link it there? Yeah, perfect. So it’d be subject line, body and frankly, I
think both of these creatives would do decently. This one lengthwise was 278
words and this one lengthwise was 214 words. Just like that, though you’ve
got two creatives.
(08:40)
So what’s the big takeaway or what’s the big point here is that you basically
can just be copying and pasting all that stuff that’s already in the sales copy
into the email. You don’t need reinvent the wheel and so I’d always start
there and then you could start doing variants from that afterwards, but you’re
saying the same thing again and again. It’s the fastest, easiest, dirtiest hack
for writing new creatives and frankly, you could probably do the same thing
for a Facebook ad, too. If you are telling me that could be a Facebook ad as
long as it was compliant or whatever, you are going to change the language a
little bit to be a bit more mild, but overall, it’s pretty much the same concept.
(09:33)
That’s all for this module. I think people overcomplicate this stuff a ton and
the reality is you just take a good idea, you riff on it, you pull from the copy as
much as you can and you write. That’s just about it.
